notes: Installed wine-stable from repository, followed https://steamcommunity.com/app/221410/discussions/0/1734336452578488603/?ctp=2 to set version to WinXP, game started without further issues.
title: Anarchy Online

notes: Game won't even launch with proton.
title: Anarchy Online

notes:
Loaded a Froob (freebie) account, configured my UI, and ran around a few of the zones. Works as expected on a native environment or maybe even slightly better than expected. To get it working however, you have to use some winetricks. Assuming you are using the default steam directory for your games, this bash command should be all you need:
WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/396280/pfx winetricks corefonts directx9 ie6 fontfix
title: Anarchy Online
